subject: HI - semi -IMPT
body:
You are always important  and not sure of what is goin on in  your life , 
truly - hope all right.
Here , OK , because I will always try to be ,  yet more than  up in the air , 
 mucho.
BRU in Santa Fe   ~ ~  Me , marcia mae  @ home  .  JEE is ??????
If you still care but a bit , you'll say something ,  even  , " miss you ~ 
stressed  ~ HI"
Marcia M.
